category_sources: Official repository summary says it mounts Hugging Face buckets and repos as local filesystems.
source_facts.description says hf-mount mounts Hugging Face Buckets and repos as local filesystems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official huggingface/hf-mount repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/huggingface/hf-mount; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies mounting Hugging Face buckets and repos as local filesystems.
